title: Remove connected board limits on Enterprise plans
excerpt:
Description
Our company manages multiple projects for 400+ account portfolios globally.  We are struggling to have a single view dashboard and reports to show status and progress of projects from 400+ account portfolios. …

posts.author: jpilapil (Jaycee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Our company manages multiple projects for 400+ account portfolios globally. We are struggling to have a single view dashboard and reports to show status and progress of projects from 400+ account portfolios.

What are you trying to achieve

We are trying to build dashboards and reports with data from 400+ account portfolios and we cannot achieve this with the limitation of only 200 connected boards with up to 60 boards connected per column.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jpilapil ,

Try our Mirror Item Multiple Boards app!

You can ditch connect boards and mirror columns altogether. It has no limits and works much better than connect boards or mirror columns.

What You Can Do -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

191920×960 210 KB

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for a FREE Demo or setup.

posts.author: jill598muncy (Jill Muncy)
posts.cookedHtml:
jpilapil:

Description

Our company manages multiple projects for 400+ account portfolios globally. We are struggling to have a single view dashboard and reports to show status and progress of projects from 400+ account portfolios.

What are you trying to achieve

We are trying to build dashboards and reports with data from 400+ account portfolios and we cannot achieve this with the limitation of only 200 connected boards with up to 60 boards connected per column.

Hello @jpilapil,
The current board connection limits are a major blocker for global portfolio visibility. Expanding support beyond 200 boards and 60 per column is essential to enable unified dashboards and accurate reporting across our 400+ projects. EZPassCT

Best Regards,
Jill Muncy
